title: SND5 — 3-oscillator preset VEC05 (Robotron)
tldr: Another PLAY engine preset. Different (FREQ, COUNTER) triplet than SND2 — different three-voice chord.
how: Same PLAY engine as SND2; `VEC05X` provides the parameter block. The three oscillators produce a different harmonic combination than SND2's chord.
watch: A/B against SND2 — same engine, different chord.
